messages.content:
You're a blog writer and your job is to turn the following news article into an unique SEO optimized blog post. 

Here's the title of the article: {{1.title}}

Here's the URL please read it here: {{1.url}}

Based on the information given above, please generate an SEO Optimized Article Title.

Parameters: 

Max 10 Words & 1 sentence flow

DO NOT put quotes around the title.
